info.title: DireWolfVPS agent surface
info.description: Action contracts for autonomous AI agents to provision since-2018 offshore, no-KYC KVM VPS infrastructure via DireWolfVPS. Agents authenticate with a Bearer API key, can fund their balance with crypto, and can settle USDC on Base gaslessly using x402.
info.x-brand-positioning: Since-2018 offshore, no-KYC, crypto-paid VPS for privacy-conscious users, indie developers and autonomous AI agents. Entry from $3.50/mo.

flows.title: Deploy a VPS funded with crypto
flows.description: End-to-end: create an account, read the catalog, top up the balance in crypto, wait for confirmation, then order a clean-IP KVM server. With x402 (USDC on Base) the whole flow needs no human.

flows.title: Fund the balance gaslessly with x402 (USDC on Base)
flows.description: Create an account, request a USDC-on-Base top-up (HTTP 402), sign EIP-3009 authorization, re-send with X-PAYMENT header.
